ADMFDigitalCertificateExpiry.probableCause: X.509 Digital Certificate between li-message handler and ADMF about to Expire
ADMFDigitalCertificateExpiry.specificProblem: X.509 Digital Certificate between li-message handler and ADMF about to Expire
ADMFDigitalCertificateExpiry.additionalText: The precondition is: the LI Message Handler is configured with ID of ADMF. And the service impact will be: If the X.509 digital certificate is not rotated on time, then it can result in broken TLS connection between LI Message Handler and ADMF

ADMFUnreachable.specificProblem: NO LI_X1 transaction between ADMF and NF

ADMFReachable.specificProblem: Activity over LI_X1 is seen, from ADMF to NF

CNFDigitalCertificateExpiry.probableCause: X.509 Digital Certificate between li-message handler and CNF about to Expire
CNFDigitalCertificateExpiry.specificProblem: X.509 Digital Certificate is about to Expire
CNFDigitalCertificateExpiry.additionalText: The precondition is: the LI Message Handler is configured with ID of <name of 5G CNF|4G control plane component>. And the service impact will be: If the X.509 digital certificate is not rotated on time, then it can result in broken TLS connection between LI Message Handler and <name of 5G CNF | 4G control plane component>

Configured.probableCause: Full configuration available for application to be ready

NotConfigured.probableCause: Full configuration unavailable for application to be ready

TerminatingFaultXID.probableCause: CNF is overloaded, MDF2 / MDF3 destination(s) is/are overloaded, Network error, LI_X2 Proxy service or UPF is overloaded, Multiple parallel active LI Tasks on that CNF
TerminatingFaultXID.specificProblem: The terminating fault occurs for active LI task
TerminatingFaultXID.additionalText: The preconditions are: the LI Task with that XID value shall be activated by ADMF and the UPF The CNF shall have active connection with LI Message handler. It can impact lawful interception for activated LI task
